content: Universal Context Engine Project Overview The Universal Context Engine is an AI-powered platform that combines a Knowledge Base with intelligent tool execution. It enables users to upload documents, build contextual knowledge, and later use that knowledge to support AI-driven decision making and actions. Objectives  Upload and manage project documents.  Extract text from PDF and TXT files.  Split extracted text into chunks.  Prepare documents for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).  Enable future integration with AI tools and workflows. Technology Stack  FastAPI  Next.js  TypeScript  Tailwind CSS  Python  ChromaDB (Future Phase)  Sentence Transformers (Future Phase) Future Scope Future phases will include vector embeddings, semantic search, a Context Engine, a Decision Engine

e Future phases will include vector embeddings, semantic search, a Context Engine, a Decision Engine, and MCP-inspired tool integration for executing actions such as sending emails or creating tasks. Sample Paragraph for Text Extraction This paragraph is intentionally included so that PDF extraction libraries such as pypdf can extract meaningful text. If your backend processes this document correctly, it should produce one or more text chunks that can be stored for later retrieval.
FastAPI is used for backend development. ChromaDB stores embeddings.
